section_miscategorizations.text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation in the left shoulder and elbow, with no warmth, erythema, or deformity.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an objective physical exam finding, not patient-reported history, and belongs in the Findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient suspects impingement syndrome of his left shoulder.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a diagnostic impression (albeit from the patient) rather than symptom history; it would be clearer in the Assessment section but does not substantially mislead where it is.
